title: botrychium lunaria var. lanceolatum
intro: Botrychium lunaria var. lanceolatum, also known as the Indian plantain or rattlesnake plantain, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Botrychium lunaria var. lanceolatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, burns, and skin conditions.
